title: Convert a DTO into a command with TryFrom
scenario: A raw DTO can be missing required fields. TryFrom gives the adapter a standard fallible conversion into the application command.
instructions: The starter already contains RegisterUserDto and RegisterUserCommand. Add RegisterUserValidationError and implement TryFrom<RegisterUserDto> for RegisterUserCommand using those errors for missing fields.

hints.body: Define RegisterUserValidationError with MissingEmail and MissingDisplayName.
Use ok_or on each Option<String>, then build RegisterUserCommand only after both fields are present.
One complete solution for Convert a DTO into a command with TryFrom is shown below.

completionExplanation: TryFrom keeps fallible boundary conversion explicit. Missing DTO fields become typed validation errors instead of unwraps or panics.
